title: Ibadan, Oyo — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Ibadan, Oyo: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Ibadan is a city in Oyo with a population of 3,565,000. One of Africa’s largest cities by area, Ibadan is a major cultural and commercial hub in southwestern Nigeria.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
